data.title: BioAge Labs files $250M mixed securities shelf
data.description:
• BioAge Labs (NASDAQ:BIOA) files $250M mixed securities shelf.
  • This prospectus is not an offer to sell these securities.
  • Filing

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield successfully completes term loan repricing
data.description:
• Cushman & Wakefield (NYSE:CWK) has completed a repricing of approximately $840 million of its Term Loan due January 2030, reducing the interest rate by 25 basis points from Term SOFR plus 2.75% to Term SOFR plus 2.50%.
  • The loan’s maturity and other terms remain unchanged. In August, the company prepaid $150 million of the same loan, bringing total debt repayment in 2025 to $200 million and to $400 million since the start of 2024.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Martin Marietta receives regulatory approval for asset swap with Quikrete
data.description:
• Martin Marietta Materials (NYSE:MLM) has secured all regulatory approvals for its asset exchange with Quikrete Holdings.
  • The transaction is expected to close in Q4, 2025.
  • Martin Marietta will acquire aggregates operations producing ~20 million tons annually across Virginia, Missouri, Kansas, and Vancouver, BC, plus $450 million in cash.
  • In return, Quikrete will acquire Martin Marietta’s Midlothian cement plant, related cement terminals, and ready-mixed concrete assets in North Texas.
  • The deal is part of both companies’ strategic efforts to optimize their core operations and regional focus.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: YouTube to carry NBCUniversal's full portfolio under new long-term distribution pact
data.description:
Comcast-owned NBCUniversal (NASDAQ:CMCSA) and Google's YouTube (NASDAQ:GOOG) (NASDAQ:GOOGL) have agreed to a long-term content distribution deal that includes carriage of NBCU's full portfolio of networks on YouTube TV.

The news comes days after media reports suggested discussions between the two hit a roadblock over rates to distribute content.

As part of the current deal, the new yet-to-be-launched sports network NBCSN will be made available on YouTube TV, and Peacock will be available on YouTube Primetime Channels in the coming months. NBC's streaming service will continue to be available on Google's platforms, including Google Play and Google TV.

The company said the deal will continue to allow Universal Pictures' collection of movies and TV series to be available for rent on YouTube, Google TV, and YouTube TV, and the video platform will also carry short snippets, highlights, and performances from NBCUniversal's premium content.

The financial terms of the agreement were not disclosed.

data.title: Constellation Energy, Maryland reach $340M agreement to boost Conowingo Dam cleanup
data.description:
The state of Maryland reached an agreement with Constellation Energy (NASDAQ:CEG) for a commitment valued at more than $340 million to fund operational improvements and environmental projects at the Conowingo Dam, Governor Moore's office announced Thursday.

The settlement, negotiated with Waterkeepers Chesapeake and the Lower Susquehanna Riverkeeper Association, sets enforceable conditions tied to the dam's federal license and is intended to offset environmental impacts from its operation, the governor's office said.

The deal allows Constellation (NASDAQ:CEG) to continue generating hydroelectric power at the Conowingo Dam on the Susquehanna River, which the state calls Maryland's largest source of renewable energy, and clears the way for the re-licensing and continued operation of the dam's hydroelectric facility on the Susquehanna River.

"This agreement will lead to real improvements in water quality in the biggest tributary of the Chesapeake Bay, while securing the future of one of our state's largest clean energy producers," Governor Moore said.

Constellation (NASDAQ:CEG) shares closed +1.9% on Thursday and posted an all-time intraday high of $357.67.

data.title: Uber acquires data-labeling startup Segments.ai
data.description:
• In a move to strengthen its AI training capabilities, Uber (NYSE:UBER) has purchased Belgian startup Segments.ai, whose data labeling platform supports the company’s autonomous driving (AD) ambitions.
  • The deal was announced on LinkedIn. Financial terms were not disclosed.
  • Segments.ai will be integrated into Uber AI Solutions.   
  • Recently, Uber (NYSE:UBER) has expanded its large-scale labeling efforts as part of its AD efforts, developing a platform that distributes annotation, translation, and editing tasks.
  • “We are continuing to double down on our LiDAR and multi-sensor data annotation capabilities as we serve customers globally,” Uber said in its LinkedIn post, adding that Segments.ai brings "solid experience in LiDAR annotation tools, deep expertise in the domain, and an incredible base of clients.”

data.title: Max Resource announces private placement
data.description:
• Max Resource (MAX:CA) (OTC Pink:MXROF) has announced a non-brokered private placement offering of up to 30,000,000 units at CAD $0.10 per unit, aiming to raise up to CAD $3,000,000.
  • Each unit consists of one common share and one-half of one transferable warrant, with each full warrant entitling the holder to purchase an additional share at CAD $0.175 per share over the next two years.
  • The proceeds will be used for mineral exploration at the Mora Gold-Silver Project and general working capital.
  • The offering is subject to TSX Venture Exchange approval, and securities will be subject to a four-month-and-one-day hold period.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Venus Concept announces $11.48 million debt-to-equity exchange transaction
data.description:
• Venus Concept (NASDAQ:VERO) announced on Thursday the company exchanged the full $11.48 million balance of its subordinated convertible notes held by affiliates of Madryn Asset Management for 545,335 shares of its Series Y preferred stock.
  • Following the transaction, the company had total debt obligations of approximately $30.1 million, a reduction of 24% compared to $39.7 million outstanding as of December 31, 2024.
  • VERO +3.58% after hours to $2.6.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: AMD leads semiconductor stocks higher as major AI investments continue to mount
data.description:
Most semiconductor stocks edged up by the close of trading on Thursday as news of major investments in artificial intelligence continues to pour in seemingly every day.

Advanced Micro Devices' (NASDAQ:AMD) shares increased 3.4% by the close of trading. On Wednesday, AMD entered into a multi-year agreement with IBM (IBM) and Zyphra. IBM plans to deliver a large cluster of AMD Instinct MI300X graphics processing units, or GPUs, on IBM Cloud for Zyphra to use for training frontier multimodal foundation models. Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) reportedly is engaged in early discussions with AMD to add the company as a potential customer for its nascent foundry business.

Nvidia ticked up 0.8%. A report today about an agreement between Microsoft (MSFT) and the neocloud company Nebius (NBIS) highlighted plans to use more than 100,000 of Nvidia's latest GB300 GPUs.

Intel, which has been at the center of a whirlwind of investment news and rumors, climbed 3.8%. It is quite the turnaround for a company stock that declined steadily all of 2024. It is now up 55% in the past month alone.

Marvell Technology (NASDAQ:MRVL) increased 2.7%. Its shares have rebounded strongly over the past 30 days, surging nearly 37% in that time frame. The data center infrastructure company revealed a massive share buy from its top executives last week.

Many other chip stocks finished in the green on Thursday as well. Analog Devices (ADI) ticked up 1%, Credo Technology (CRDO) increased 3%, Broadcom (AVGO) and Qualcomm (QCOM) both edged up 1.4% and Astera Labs (NASDAQ:ALAB) jumped 7.8%. GlobalFoundries (GFS) increased 3.5%.

The Philadelphia Semiconductor Index (SOX) increased 1.9%, and the First Trust Nasdaq Semiconductor ETF (NASDAQ:FTXL) moved up 1.7%.

data.title: Immersion Corporation receives Nasdaq notice for delayed filing
data.description:
• Immersion Corporation (NASDAQ:IMMR) received a Nasdaq delinquency notice for failing to timely file its report for the quarter ended July 31, 2025.
  • The company is now non-compliant with Nasdaq’s continued listing requirements due to the filing delay.
  • Immersion must submit a plan to regain compliance or face potential delisting actions.
  • Source: Press release
